lines.english: The nether worlds, realms and worlds of form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਸਾਜੇ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਢਾਹੇ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: hukame saaje hukame dtaahe hukame mel milaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: By the Hukam of Your Command, You create, and by Your Command, You destroy. By Your Command, You unite in Union. ||5||
You are Inaccessible, Unfathomable and Self-Sufficient.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹੀ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੋ ਹੋਵੈ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jehee mat dehi so hovai too aape sabad bujhaaeidaa |6|
lines.english: As is the understanding You give, so do I become. You Yourself reveal the Shabad. ||6||
One who realizes Your Command, praises Your Command.
Night and day, the days of our lives wear away.
Night and day both bear witness to this loss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਮੂੜਾ ਸਿਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਰੂਆਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: manamukh andh na chetai moorraa sir aoopar kaal rooaaeidaa |7|
lines.english: The blind, foolish, self-willed manmukh is not aware of this; death is hovering over his head. ||7||
Doubt is eliminated from within, and fear runs away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal gur charanee laagaa |
lines.english: The mind and body are cooled and soothed, holding tight to the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਸਚੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਬੋਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand sache gun gaaveh sach baanee bolaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: One is in bliss forever, singing the Glorious Praises of the True Lord, and speaking the True Word of His Bani. ||8||
has the good fortune of perfect destiny, and recognizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
One who knows You as the Architect of Karma,
The stubborn and insensitive mind is attached to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: jat pat sach sachaa sach soee haumai maar milaaeidaa |9|
lines.english: The Lord, the Truest of the True, is his social class and honor. Conquering his ego, he is united with the Lord. ||9||
He Himself created the 8.4 million species of beings.
Deluded by doubt, the unfortunate wander around in confusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੇ ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: karam hovai taa satigur seve sahaje hee sukh paaeidaa |10|
lines.english: But if they are blessed by God's Grace, they serve the True Guru, and easily obtain peace. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: bin bhagatee bisattaa vich vaasaa bisattaa vich fir paaeidaa |11|
lines.english: Without devotion, one lives in manure; he falls into manure again and again. ||11||
Only in this human life, is devotional worship to the Guru implanted within.
Without God's Grace, how can anyone find Him?
If one is blessed with His Grace, devotional worship to the Guru is implanted within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae karataa jiau bhaavai tivai chalaaeidaa |12|
lines.english: The Creator Himself acts, and inspires all to act; as He wills, he leads us on. ||12||
The Simritees and the Shaastras do not know His limits.
The blind fool does not recognize the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae karataa aape bharam bhulaaeidaa |13|
lines.english: The Creator Himself acts, and inspires all to act; He Himself deludes with doubt. ||13||
He Himself causes everything to be done.
He Himself joins each and every person to his tasks.
The True Lord and Master is profoundly deep and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aape thaap uthaape vekhai guramukh aap bujhaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: He Himself establishes and disestablishes, and watches over all; He reveals Himself to the Gurmukh. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: agam agochar keemat nahee paaee guramukh man vasaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: He is inaccessible and unfathomable; His value cannot be estimated. He dwells in the mind of the Gurmukh. ||15||
Praising Him forever, the mind is comforted and consoled.
He Himself is detached; all others are entangled in their affairs.
By Guru's Grace, one comes to understand Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੩॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai ghatt antar guramatee mel milaaeidaa |16|3|17|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to dwell deep within the heart; through the Guru's Teachings, one is united in His Union. ||16||3||17||
Maaroo, Third Mehl:
Only You Yourself know this, O Creator Lord.
For thirty-six ages, utter darkness prevailed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰ ਕਿਆ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ਕਿ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣੈ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hor kiaa ko kahai ki aakh vakhaanai too aape keemat paaeidaa |1|
lines.english: What can anyone else say? What can anyone explain? Only You Yourself can estimate Your worth. ||1||
The One Universal Creator created the entire Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਕ ਕਰੇ ਸਭਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਆਪੇ ਭੰਨਿ ਘੜਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape vek kare sabh saachaa aape bhan gharraaeidaa |2|
lines.english: The True Lord Himself makes all distinctions; He Himself breaks and builds. ||2||
All the plays and dramas are to Your glory and greatness.
Through the Perfect Guru, one comes to behold it.
The Juggler has staged His juggling show.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਰਹੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa alipat rahai gurasabadee saache siau chit laaeidaa |3|
lines.english: One who remains forever detached in the Word of the Guru's Shabad - his consciousness is attuned to the True Lord. ||3||
The Player Himself plays them.
The musical instruments of the body vibrate and resound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਪਉਣੁ ਵਹੈ ਇਕ ਰੰਗੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਪਵਣੈ ਸਭ ਵਜਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt paun vahai ik rangee mil pavanai sabh vajaaeidaa |4|
lines.english: The breath flows equally through the hearts of each and every being. Receiving the breath, all the instruments sing. ||4||
